offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 clients/month, manual document generation causes delays in compliance reporting. We simplify compliance document generation instead of manual document creation using spreadsheets and word processors.
problem: Manual generation of compliance documents is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Participate in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try document generation and audit trail logging on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showing the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Reduce steps in the onboarding process
